## Career summary

Started as a backend engineer at a fintech startup in 2010, moved into
technical leadership at a series B SaaS company, then spent three years
as VP Engineering at a 50-person product company before going independent
in 2021. Since then I have worked with 12 organisations across fintech,
healthtech, and public sector.

## Key experiences

- Led a 60-person engineering org through a platform migration from
  monolith to services architecture (2018–2020)
- Conducted technical due diligence for four acquisitions totalling
  approximately £80M
- Founded and maintained an open source developer tooling project
  with 3,000+ GitHub stars
- Delivered a 6-month engineering effectiveness programme for a
  government digital service team

## Education and credentials

BSc Computer Science, University of Edinburgh (2008)
AWS Solutions Architect Professional (2022)
CTO Craft community member

## Notable projects

Persona (this project) — sovereign AI identity infrastructure via MCP.
A public sector engineering maturity assessment framework published under
Creative Commons and adopted by three government departments.
